'''Scherkil Hlas''' were squat birds used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Flightless, they were a source of protein.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']] {{Ab|Millennium Falcon (audiobook)}}
